matched_to: luxury travel advisors and tour operators in the US

leads.title: Vice President, Sales and Marketing at American Excursionist
leads.company_description: Excursionist is a luxury DMC for the entire United States (including Alaska and Hawaii), Canada and the Caribbean, with two brands, American Excursionist and Canadian Excursionist. We offer custom, FIT, and incentive groups and events planning services. Aside from the more than 300 accommodations we contract with, we differentiate ourselves through our access to unique experiences, itineraries, experts and guides throughout the region. These range from the affordable to the relatively expensive and from the outdoorsy to chic city experiences.

leads.title: Full-Stack Web Developer
leads.company_description:
We are a group of experienced and creative professionals dedicated to making your trip an unforgettable experience.

We will handle your Event, Incentive Group, Meeting or Personalized Service from A to Z!

We specialize in tailor made solutions! We will analyze your needs in order to offer you what you are looking for.

Our commitment is to fulfill all yours and your client's service needs, marketing and communication goals!

We will help you with the design and operation of the group or event, including accommodations, activities, transportation and any other necessary logistics.

We work with a positive and team attitude because we know that the final success of a Group or Event is always a team effort!

leads.title: Founder & CEO at SKYIN: Curating Immersive Journeys Across Kenya | Exclusive Tribal Village Experiences | Luxurious Safaris | Custom Itineraries | Sustainable Travel & Philanthropic Community Support
leads.company_address: 3515 S Holly St, Denver, Colorado 80237, US
leads.company_description:
SKYIN is about a different way, a journey to explore an authentic Kenya. One which affords travelers a glimpse beyond the veil of tourism through luxurious safaris and beachfront stays paired with immersive cultural experiences. 

Our founder, Skyler Mason, has spent his life exploring Kenya and has had the privilege of living among local communities. This experience allowed him to deeply engage with their rich cultures and build meaningful relationships with indigenous tribes. SKYIN was established to connect people across the world in an authentic way while making a sustainable impact on local communities. We achieve this by our commitment to empowering and supporting Kenyan communities by providing sustainable employment opportunities and essential resources for its people.

As a full-service DMC (Destination Management Company) with offices in Denver, CO, USA, and Nairobi, Kenya, SKYIN specializes in fully customized travel for FIT and small groups. We blend luxury with authenticity, tailoring all-inclusive excursions to fit the specific wishes, desires, and budgets of our partners and their clients. Our immersive journeys cater to all types of travelers, including couples, seniors, ultra-luxury seekers, families (with children), multi-generational groups, solo travelers, millennials, those tracing their ancestry, corporate travelers, wellness enthusiasts, and women-only groups, among others.

Our custom excursions offer the unique opportunity to exclusively immerse into indigenous tribal villages, discover exotic wildlife on safari and at conservation sanctuaries, sail the pristine waters of the Indian Ocean on traditional dhow boats, unearth Kenya's rich history and the ancient slave trade, culturally connect with a vetted Nairobi host family, and more.

Discover SKYIN at LiveSKYIN.com.
